REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR MAR-11-2025 AT 9:30AM IN DEPARTMENT 206. - *** CASE IS DISMISSED. *** MATTER IS CALLED AT 9:37AM. NO APPEARANCE FOR PLAINTIFF SHARI MOSLEY AND NO APPEARANCE FOR PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY. DEFENDANT JOHN COWAN APPEARING AS SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT. DEFENDANT VIRGINIA "GINGER" DYAL APPEARING AS SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT VIA ZOOM. CASE HAS BEEN TRAILING AND THERE'S AN AVAILABLE COURTROOM TODAY FOR PARTIES TO BE SENT OUT TO TRIAL, BUT THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY. THIS IS TRIAL CALL AND EVERYBODY NEEDS TO BE HERE IN PERSON. THE COURT HAS BEEN ACCOMMODATING AS IT CAN, BUT GIVEN THAT THERE'S NO PLAINTIFF AND PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY WHO BOTH KNOW WHAT THE RULES ARE, THE COURT DISMISSES THE CASE WITH PREJUDICE. MR. COWAN REQUESTS ORDER FOR FEES AND COSTS. COURT INFORMS MR. COWAN TO SUBMIT A MOTION. JUDGE: ROCHELLE C. EAST; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MASTER COURT TRIAL CALENDAR SET FOR FEB-03-2025 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT ON MAR-03-2025 AT 9:30 AM IN 206. NOTICE WAIVED. APPEARANCE BY SELF-REPRESENTED PLAINTIFF SHARI MOSLEY. APPEARANCE BY SELF-REPRESENTED DEFENDANT JOHN E. COWAN. DEFENDANT GINGER DYAL WAS PERMITTED TO APPEAR VIA ZOOM, BUT THE COURT HAD PROBLEM WITH ZOOM CONNECTION. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL SUBSTITUTED OUT OF THE CASE ON 1/31/25. THE COURT GRANTED PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR A TRIAL CONTINUANCE. THIS WILL BE THE LAST CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL DATE. NOTICE OF TRIAL ON 3/3/25 IS WAIVED. PARTIES MUST CONTACT THE ADR COORDINATOR TO SCHEDULE AND COMPLETE A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE PRIOR TO 3/3/25. THE COURT ISSUED SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST ATTORNEY RESHMA KAMATH FOR FAILURE TO SUBMIT TRIAL READINESS INFORMATION AS ORDERED IN THE NOTICE OF TRIAL. JUDGE: ROCHELLE EAST; CLERK: D. LOK; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorney'S Fees, Costs, And Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-17-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. Reshma Kamath, Esq. of Law Office of Reshma Kamath (tel: 650-257-0719) for the Plaintiff.
Atty. John Cowan, Esq. of Law Offices of John E. Cowan (tel: 888-252-1231), in pro per.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT JOHN COWAN's Motion For Attorney's Fees, Costs, And Sanctions.

Plaintiff's counsel withdraws her notice of contest. Matter argued and submitted. Upon conclusion, the Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant John Cowan's motion for attorney's fees, costs, and sanctions is denied in its entirety. Mr. Cowan provides no authority that a self-represented litigant who is also an attorney may obtain attorney's fees for his own work per CCP 128.5 or 128.7. Even if that is permissible, Mr. Cowan has not submitted sufficient admissible evidence establishing that the filing or maintenance of this case by Ms. Mosley was frivolous or solely intended to cause unnecessary delay or that any of the requirements of CCP 128.7(b) were not satisfied by Ms. Mosley. The court's minutes show that this case was dismissed due to the non-appearance of Ms. Mosley and her counsel at a time when the court was ready to send this case to a trial department and not because of any deficiency in the merits of the case. Moreover, because no judgment has been entered, it is premature to award any costs.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/HEK)
